formulas.latex: min t_{n} s . t . t_{\mathit{krj}} - t_{\mathit{krp}} \geq w_{\mathit{krp} \underline \mathit{krj}}^{F} + M \left(1 - y_{\mathit{kr}}\right) \left(\mathit{krp} , \mathit{krj}\right) \in F t_{\mathit{krz}} - t_{\mathit{umv}} \geq w_{\mathit{umv} \underline \mathit{krz}}^{F} + M \left(2 - y_{\mathit{um}} - y_{\mathit{kr}}\right) \left(\mathit{umv} , \mathit{krz}\right) \in F t_{\mathit{ump}} - t_{\mathit{krj}} \geq w_{\mathit{krj} \underline \mathit{ump}}^{A} + M \left(2 - y_{\mathit{um}} - y_{\mathit{kr}}\right) + \mathit{Mx}_{\left(\mathit{krj} , \mathit{ump}\right) , \left(\mathit{umi} , \mathit{krp}\right)} \left(\left(\mathit{krj} , \mathit{ump}\right) , \left(\mathit{umi} , \mathit{krp}\right)\right) \in A t_{\mathit{krp}} - t_{\mathit{umi}} \geq w_{\mathit{umi} \underline \mathit{krp}}^{A} + M \left(2 - y_{\mathit{um}} - y_{\mathit{kr}}\right) + M \left(1 - x_{\left(\mathit{krj} , \mathit{ump}\right) , \left(\mathit{umi} , \mathit{krp}\right)}\right) \left(\left(\mathit{krj} , \mathit{ump}\right) , \left(\mathit{umi} , \mathit{krp}\right)\right) \in A \sum_{a = 1}^{R_{b}} y_{\mathit{ab}} = 1 b = 1 , \ldots , Z y_{\mathit{ab}} \in \left\{0 , 1\right\} x_{\left(\mathit{krj} , \mathit{ump}\right) , \left(\mathit{umi} , \mathit{krp}\right)} \in \left\{0 , 1\right\}

                                    <mml:mrow>

                                 <mml:msub>

                                 <mml:mi>b</mml:mi>

                                 <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>
                                 <mml:mo>…</mml:mo>
                                 <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>
                                 <mml:mi>Z</mml:mi>

                                 <mml:msub>

                                    </mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:mi mathvariant="italic">ab</mml:mi>
                                    </mml:mrow>
                                 </mml:msub>
                                 <mml:mo>∈</mml:mo>
                                 <mml:mo>{</mml:mo>

                                 <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>

                                 <mml:msub>

                                    <mml:mrow>

                                       <mml:mi mathvariant="italic">ump</mml:mi>

                                       <mml:mo>,</mml:mo>

                                       <mml:mi mathvariant="italic">krp</mml:mi>
                                       <mml:mo>)</mml:mo>

                                 <mml:mo>∈</mml:mo>
